response.justification: The candidate has relevant C++ experience, but the resume highlights a broader range of technologies and experiences, with less focus on the specific requirements of the job.
strengths: C++ experience from work at National Instruments
Strong background in software development across multiple platforms
Experience with various programming languages and technologies
concerns: Limited direct experience in industrial automation or IoT
Less emphasis on C++ and STL in recent roles
No clear mention of experience with IEC 62443 or similar security standards
